summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is addressed by removing authentication checks from Contact, EstimateCalculator, and Chatbot components, and removing caller-based authorization from backend submitQueryForm, submitContactForm, and calculateEstimate functions while keeping admin-only checks on getAllQueryForms/getAllContactForms. REQ-2 is addressed in Hero.tsx with large (text-4xl/text-6xl), extrabold, orange (text-orange-500) styling on the tagline text.
